nasb.text: For they had previously seen Trophimus the Ephesian in the city with him, and they supposed that Paul had brought him into the temple.

esv.text: For they had previously seen Trophimus the Ephesian with him in the city, and they supposed that Paul had brought him into the temple.

cnv.text: 原來他們看見過以弗所人特羅非摩同保羅在城裡，就以為保羅帶他進了殿。

ccb.text: 这是因为他们在城里见过一个名叫特罗非摩的以弗所人和保罗在一起，以为保罗一定把他带进圣殿了。

csbs.text: 原来他们曾经看见以弗所人特罗费摩与保罗一起在城里，就以为保罗带他进了圣殿。
